label: AppleScript • scripted confirmEach gate (approve path)
query: Set the body of the note 'Standup' to 'Shipped the gate.'
notes: Model-free CI anchor for the confirmEach execution mode: the mutating script must pass through the confirm gate (the eval confirm seam approves) and then execute — proving the gate path completes instead of deadlocking or silently skipping, and that the write actually lands in the mock world. Complements the unit tests: this exercises the same wiring the app uses (AppleScriptEvaluator → AppleScriptLoop confirm seam). No tokens.

scriptedCalls: {"script":"tell application \"Notes\" to set body of note \"Standup\" to \"Shipped the gate.\""}
